heading: Professional ISP Courses
subtitle: Hands-on training from working network engineers — build a career in connectivity.

items.title: ISP Setup & Business Management
items.description: Everything to launch and run a profitable ISP — licensing, upstream, billing, and operations.

items.title: MikroTik Router Configuration
items.description: MTCNA-prep course covering RouterOS, queues, firewall, PPPoE, and hotspot setups.

items.title: Fiber Optic Splicing & FTTH Installation
items.description: Practical splicing, OTDR testing, and complete FTTH network deployment skills.

items.title: CCNA Networking Fundamentals
items.description: Routing, switching, subnetting, and network security aligned with the CCNA exam.

items.title: Linux for Network Engineers
items.description: Server administration, shell scripting, and network services on production Linux.

items.title: CCTV Installation & Maintenance
items.description: Camera selection, DVR/NVR setup, cabling, and remote-view configuration.
